title: Lead Instructional Designer at Osmania University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Osmania University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Osmania University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Osmania University:
Osmania University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Osmania University!
